requirement_topic.en: English/French bilingual labelling and consumer information
requirement_topic.zh: 英法双语标签及消费者信息
requirement_topic.zht: 英法雙語標籤及消費者資訊

summary.en: Consumer packaging and many required declarations for Canadian retail products must be presented in English and French under federal consumer packaging and labelling rules, with additional Quebec French-language requirements potentially applying at retail. For refrigerators, bilingual planning should cover package identity, dealer-facing and consumer-facing declarations, EnerGuide label elements, warnings, user instructions, warranty material, and safety markings where language is used.
summary.zh: 加拿大零售产品的消费品包装及许多规定声明须依据联邦消费品包装和标签规则以英文和法文呈现，且魁北克零售环节还可能适用额外法语要求。对电冰箱而言，双语规划应覆盖包装身份、面向经销商和消费者的声明、EnerGuide标签要素、警告、用户说明、保修材料以及含文字的安全标识。
summary.zht: 加拿大零售產品的消費品包裝及許多規定聲明須依據聯邦消費品包裝和標籤規則以英文和法文呈現，且魁北克零售環節還可能適用額外法語要求。對電冰箱而言，雙語規劃應覆蓋包裝身份、面向經銷商和消費者的聲明、EnerGuide標籤要素、警告、用戶說明、保固材料以及含文字的安全標識。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Packaging and Labelling Act (R.S.C., 1985, c. C-38)
Consumer Packaging and Labelling Regulations (C.R.C., c. 417)
Energy Efficiency Regulations, 2016 — bilingual household appliance energy efficiency label schedules where applicable

summary.en: China domestic refrigerator labels and instructions are normally prepared in simplified Chinese under Chinese consumer product and appliance standards. Export packaging may add English, but that does not automatically satisfy Canadian English/French legal and retail expectations.
summary.zh: 中国国内电冰箱标签和说明书通常依据中国消费品及家电标准使用简体中文。出口包装可能增加英文，但这不会自动满足加拿大英法双语法律和零售要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內電冰箱標籤和說明書通常依據中國消費品及家電標準使用簡體中文。出口包裝可能增加英文，但這不會自動滿足加拿大英法雙語法律和零售要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 5296.2 — Instructions for use of products of consumer interest: household and similar electrical appliances
GB 4706.13 marking and instruction requirements for refrigerating appliances
China Energy Label content for household refrigerators

gap.en: A China-market label set usually lacks French and Canadian terminology. Translation must be controlled as regulated content, not treated as marketing copy, because energy, safety, identity, quantity, importer, warranty, and warning statements can be reviewed by regulators or retailers.
gap.zh: 中国市场标签套件通常缺少法文和加拿大术语。翻译应作为受监管内容控制，而不是普通营销文案，因为能效、安全、身份、数量、进口商、保修和警告声明均可能被监管机构或零售商审查。
gap.zht: 中國市場標籤套件通常缺少法文和加拿大術語。翻譯應作為受監管內容控制，而不是普通行銷文案，因為能效、安全、身份、數量、進口商、保固和警告聲明均可能被監管機構或零售商審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for applicable federal consumer packaging declarations and required energy-label content; Quebec French-language retail rules may add separate obligations
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese-language product instructions and markings are required for China domestic sale; English/French bilingual Canadian content is not covered by China domestic files

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build a Canadian bilingual artwork and manual review before shipment. English-only export packaging or China domestic simplified-Chinese files are not enough for Canadian retail channels.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】出货前应建立加拿大双语版面和说明书审查。仅英文出口包装或中国国内简体中文文件不足以支持加拿大零售渠道。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】出貨前應建立加拿大雙語版面和說明書審查。僅英文出口包裝或中國國內簡體中文文件不足以支持加拿大零售渠道。
